event-template-caravan-coffee-roasters-l.title: London Roastery Tour & Tasting
event-template-caravan-coffee-roasters-l.description_raw: A GUIDED TOUR OF OUR NORTH LONDON ROASTERY, FOLLOWED BY A COFFEE TASTING WHERE YOU’LL LEARN ABOUT HOW & WHERE COFFEE IS GROWN, HOW WE ROAST IT AND DISCOVER BREWING TIPS & TRICKS.

event-template-caravan-coffee-roasters-h.title: Home Filter Class

event-template-caravan-coffee-roasters-h.title: Home Espresso Class

event-template-comptoir-bakery-cake-baki.description_raw: Learn to transform a simple cake into a stunning masterpiece in our hands- on workshop led by our chef. | One gluten-friendly ticket for one person for the Cake Baking & Decorating Workshop. The gluten-friendly ticket uses gluten-free flour. Please note that the workshop environment is not gluten-free, and ingredients containing gluten will also be used in the same space. Because of possible cross-contamination and traces of gluten, this option is not suitable for people with coeliac disease or severe gluten allergies.

Come and learn how to create the perfect tartelette - from the crust to the cream. | Two tickets for your mum and you for the Mother's Day Mini French Tart Workshop, including a complimentary glass of wine or bubble for all mums!

Come and learn how to create the perfect tartelette - from the crust to the cream. | Two tickets for your mum and you for the Mother's Day Mini French Tart Workshop, including a complimentary glass of wine or bubble for all mums!
